title: Last-mile fuel crisis — diesel shortage collapses delivery networks
historical_analogue: 2021-2022 US diesel shortage, 2022 UK trucker shortage
description: A refinery closure combined with a truck driver shortage causes diesel to hit $7/gallon. Amazon Prime delivery SLAs slip to 5-7 days. Grocery chains report empty shelves as replenishment cycles break down. FedEx and UPS add emergency fuel surcharges.
